flashcards.back: Compares two strings for exact character-by-character equality (case-sensitive).
equals() compares content, == compares object references.
Negative integer, zero, or positive integer based on lexicographical comparison.
Finds the first occurrence of a character or substring in a string.

flashcards.front: What is the return value of contains()?
flashcards.back: Boolean true if substring exists, false otherwise.
